one_liner: D2C spirits club providing education, discovery, and access to the world of fine spirits.

name: Fleksy
description: Fleksy integrates a multitude of productivity, eCommerce and entertainment services directly into the keyboard. Since most users spend a lot of time in messaging apps, switching from application to application and can now use their time more efficiently. Fleksy lets you attach documents, photos, to-dos, create events, and even more while messaging – all within your keyboard. Discover an intuitive gesture system coupled with auto-correction in 65+ languages. Holder of the world’s record for the fastest keyboard, Fleksy makes typing on a mobile smartphone a breeze!
one_liner: 3rd party mobile keyboard with integrated social & productivity features.

name: Flexkeeping
description: Flexkeeping (acquired by Mews in 2025) is a complete software solution for hotel housekeeping and operations helping hospitality professionals save time and work more efficiently. Processes that previously required manual work, multiple phone calls, and paper reports can now be managed from one simple application improving how hotel staff communicates, delegates tasks, and manages processes. ‍ The company’s software solution saves hotels hundreds of man-hours per month, drastically reduces inventory loss, and boosts productivity. World-class hotels all over Europe like Le Meridien, Holiday Inn, and Radisson Blu have adopted Flexkeeping as their operations software of choice. ‍
one_liner: Hotel operations software empowering hospitality professionals to work more efficiently.

name: Flinn
description: Flinn's vision is to make high-quality health products accessible for everyone. The first major milestone on this journey is to enable medical device manufacturers to automate quality and regulatory processes. The go-to-market product sets the focus on the automation of post-market surveillance processes. This means automating the collection, evaluation, and reporting of relevant data through smart workflows, integrations, and the support of AI.
one_liner: Enabling MedTech companies to automate quality & regulatory processes to launch and operate products 10x more efficiently.

name: Flow48
description: By embedding in the customer’s payment gateway, Flow48 can offer businesses upfront lump-sum investment capital to invest in inventory or CAPEX and generate future revenues.
one_liner: Offering revenue-based financing to online and offline businesses.

name: Flowdesk
description: In a context of exponential growth of token issuers in the web3 space, Flowdesk is building an infrastructure to help them tackle their financial needs with a more transparent and controlled approach. ‍ Flowdesk has built a scalable infrastructure that connects crypto-exchanges to innovative products, such as Market-Making as a Service (MMaaS). MMaaS is radically different than traditional liquidity provisions where issuers fully own their liquidity and can control the strategy according to their needs. ‍ To support their vision of scalable and regulated market-making in crypto , Flowdesk offers banking-grade compliance and stringent procedures to guarantee they always work in the best interests of issuers.
one_liner: Allowing web3 token issuers to manage their liquidity actively through Market-Making as a Service.

name: ForTunes
description: ForTunes (acquired by Utopia Music in 2023) puts comprehensive Music Data Analytics at the fingertips of a new generation of music creators by collecting, fetching, and visualizing data and providing customers with insights that help them understand who is playlisting & uploading their music and how their audience is growing.
one_liner: Mobile music data analytics app for self-published artists and small labels.

name: forward earth
description: Decarbonization has become a crucial regulatory requirement for businesses globally, yet the vast majority of companies still do not have clear visibility into their environmental impact, especially deeper down the supply chain. ‍ forward earth has built a product that empowers businesses worldwide to become sustainable and compliant with little effort and cost. By embedding our AI-automated environmental management software into our partners’ software, forward earth will support millions of businesses in every aspect of their reporting lifecycle as they undertake their decarbonization journey in the years to come.
one_liner: Easy-to-use, AI-powered environmental management seamlessly integrated into existing compliance and supply chain software.

name: Friday Finance
description: Friday Finance (acquired by Pliant in 2023) is the next-generation financial operations platform for startups and SMEs that puts all bank accounts and financial data into one place and helps them streamline and automate mundane tasks. It provides real-time insights into a business's cash flows and offers finance professionals better workflows for bill payments, approvals and the month-end close.
one_liner: Business finance, simplified.

name: Fuse
description: With only one in six patients knowing their costs upfront, and providers losing up to 10% of revenue to insurer underpayments, healthcare financial inefficiency is widespread in the US, even though clinics spend over 20% of their budgets on billing and collections. ‍ Fuse uses AI to automate tedious tasks like checking portals and calling insurers, so patients get accurate cost estimates before treatment and clinics save time previously spent on manual estimates and bill explanations.
one_liner: Bringing price transparency to US healthcare.

name: Genie
description: Genie is an open source startup providing low/no-code tools for building data science applications. With Genie, data scientists and R&D engineers can quickly turn ML models and simulations into shareable web apps and data products that drive the business forward.
one_liner: Providing low/no-code tools for building data science applications.

name: byrd
description: Byrd is a managed B2B marketplace for eCommerce fulfillment. Their all-in-one logistics platform equips users with a comprehensive dashboard and connects to online shop systems such as Shopify and Woocommerce to make drop-shipping, eCommerce fulfillment or crowdfunding campaign management seamless. ‍ Byrd integrates with all major logistics partners in the German-speaking market and automatically finds the best provider for each shipment. The company also runs storage facilities in Europe, takes care of individual packaging, and manages pick-ups as well as returns.
one_liner: B2B marketplace for full-service ecommerce fulfillment.

name: Fairplay
description: Fairplay is a revenue-based financing enabler for the new digital economy in Latin America with the mission to empower entrepreneurs’ growth with a fast, flexible and friendly product by investing in their working capital cycles directly through their three main needs: performance marketing campaigns, logistics costs and inventories. ‍ For fast-growing e-commerce businesses, Fairplay offers growth capital funding in exchange for a steady revenue share of their earnings until capital is paid back plus a flat fee.
one_liner: Supporting entrepreneurs’ growth in Latin America with a flexible, fast and friendly financial product.

name: Flank
description: Flank is pioneering autonomous AI agents to transform enterprise legal, compliance, and security operations. ‍ The Berlin-based company addresses a core challenge for many organizations: the significant time and resources lost to high-volume, repetitive tasks, which prevents strategic focus. Flank believes critical functions like legal, compliance, and security should be powered by intelligent automation, enabling human experts to focus on complex, high-value work. ‍ To achieve this, Flank builds and deploys invisible AI agents directly embedded within existing enterprise systems. Its innovative approach revolutionizes how businesses manage these critical workflows, driving efficiency and ensuring compliance by automating what was once manual and time-consuming. ‍
one_liner: An AI colleague for expert teams.

name: Kwest
description: Kwest (acquired by Kraken Technologies in 2024) was a platform helps you automate manual tasks, create visibility across your team and send data where you need it. With Kwest, you install and maintain assets more efficiently.
one_liner: Renewable energy companies use Kwest to manage their installations end-to-end and automate their operations.

name: Mundi
description: Mundi simplifies access to high-yield savings accounts by connecting users to 15+ Turkish banks through a single investment platform. With one-click access to overnight and long-term savings accounts for TRY and FX deposits, Mundi enables effortless, automated working capital management. Beyond savings accounts, users can dynamically allocate funds to low-risk financial products, including money market funds (MMFs) and overnight repo agreements, all within Mundi’s seamless investment platform. ‍
one_liner: Treasury-as-a-Service platform for companies without dedicated treasury teams to optimize funds in high-yield, low-risk financial products.

name: Ozé
description: Despite merchants and micro-SMEs forming the pillars on which West African economies stand, these businesses have been overwhelmingly ignored and neglected by mobile-based financial service providers. Ozé helps capture, analyze and improve the performance of business owners in Ghana and Nigeria with the ambition to become a pan-African player. Through their digital accounting system, which enables users to keep track of their records, AR and AP and get access to credit, Ozé users are able to operate like large businesses and, therefore, empowers micro-SMEs to grow and scale far beyond their current reach. Having partnered with the region’s biggest banks, SME banks and local fintechs, Ozé is able to provide its users with products from traditional financial institutions but with the seamless interface and usability of a social media platform.
one_liner: Empowering African micro-SMEs to grow and scale.

name: Pliant
description: Pliant empowers businesses worldwide with streamlined B2B payment solutions. Designed to serve industries with complex, high-volume payment needs - like travel and ecommerce - Pliant's platform allows companies to issue cards, access credit lines, and payment features directly into their workflows. ‍ With seamless integrations, white-labeling options, and real-time APIs, Pliant enables full-stack control of business payments and reconciliation.
one_liner: A B2B payments platform built to meet the needs of high-growth businesses and embedded finance players.

name: Rollee
description: Rollee is a platform for employment data used by clients across various industries, from fleet management to lending, who are committed to making the fairest decisions with a data-driven approach. ‍ They can access through their customers' permission their income, activity, and other employment data points that will help to make more inclusive decisions.
one_liner: Helping financial institutions to make fairer decisions by using the power of employment data.

name: GetVocal
description: GetVocal builds reliable AI phone agents that combine the flexibility of LLMs with the control businesses need. At the core is a proprietary Conversational Graph OS that structures conversations for goal-oriented, auditable, and high-performing automation. Unlike black-box systems, it lets users orchestrate the balance between deterministic and generative behavior. Each interaction feeds real-time data back into the system to continuously improve outcomes. ‍
one_liner: Building reliable AI phone agents that give businesses full control over conversations through performance-driven, continuously learning voice technology.

name: Gigs
description: Gigs, the operating system for mobile services, empowers tech companies to seamlessly embed connectivity into their offerings in weeks. ‍ By bundling phone plans and travel data with their core services, Gigs' customers can increase stickiness and unlock a new recurring revenue stream with digital mobile experiences that meaningfully create value for consumers. Gigs' end-to-end platform provides everything brands like Klarna, Nubank, and OnePay need to launch and operate their own multi-market mobile service: premium connectivity, a hosted checkout, billing, subscription management, analytics, and AI-powered customer service. ‍
one_liner: Empowering businesses to effortlessly embed telecom capabilities into their platforms.

name: Ona
description: Ona (formerly Gitpod) is a software development platform where teams create, delegate, and review code alongside autonomous engineering agents. Its API-first, sandboxed environments offer OS-level isolation, secure management of code and secrets, and full compatibility with VS Code—both in browser and mobile. ‍ What makes Ona unique is its team of agents, which automate routine tasks, boost productivity, and enable parallel development. Enterprise users benefit from bank-grade security, private infrastructure deployment, and granular policy controls, ideal for organizations needing compliance and speed in their workflows.
one_liner: Redefining how engineers build software through AI-driven autonomy and secure cloud environments.

name: Diligent
description: Diligent AI builds AI agents for KYC and AML teams, automating reasoning-heavy workflows such as sanctions screening, adverse media analysis, and merchant due diligence. By replacing static compliance processes with autonomous AI analysts that read, reason, and investigate, the platform reduces operational costs while improving risk detection and decision quality across financial institutions.
one_liner: The autonomous AI platform for financial crime compliance.

name: Katch
description: Our mission is to save you time and allow you to optimize your time for what is most important. Blow up the calendar, starting with all those scheduled 1:1 meetings. ‍ Our goal is to change how we think about time. We want to remove the rigidity of the calendar and turn it into something more spontaneous, off-grid, and in the moment.
one_liner: An anti-calendar product that gives us more time.

name: Konfetti
description: More than a booking platform, konfetti enables suppliers to manage their business and increase their sales with an all-in-one software. In doing so, the company actively markets the classes. At the same time, the workshop provider has significantly less administrative work. Many processes that were previously handled offline or manually can now be handled through the konfetti platform. Billing and invoicing, is fully automated, tax compliant, and reduces unnecessary coordination with the company's own tax advisor. Launched in 2021 in Berlin, users can now find and book workshops in more than 250 cities. Hundreds of companies use konfetti as their go-to source for organizing and booking team events and corporate parties.
one_liner: Building the leading platform for local workshops and events by empowering providers with customized SaaS solutions.

name: GoStudent
description: GoStudent is a leading European EdTech platform built to provide flexible, one-to-one tutoring services for school-aged students. The company operates entirely online, connecting K-12 learners with a verified global network of educators through its proprietary virtual classroom environment via video conferencing. ‍ Providing long-term academic support, GoStudent also utilizes AI-powered matching to pair students with the most compatible tutor based on their learning style and specific academic needs, promoting greater continuity and personalized success. ‍
one_liner: Personalized tutoring platform, built for scale.

name: GoTiger
description: GoTiger is building the gateway of choice for shopping for Asian groceries. ‍ The same-day delivery startup offers a high-quality assortment, geared toward the taste of Western consumers with an interest in Asian food and lifestyle. From tasty dumplings to spicy ramen, from sashimi-quality fish to juicy fruits - GoTiger offers a unique selection of groceries from countries like Japan, Korea, and China as well as everyday essentials - delivered on the same day within a 2-hour time slot.
one_liner: Delivering Asian groceries, today.

name: Grace
description: Grace empowers luxury brands to offer their clients seamless, complimentary protection against theft and loss — from watches and jewelry to high-end travel pieces. Designed for the modern luxury consumer, Grace transforms traditional insurance into a branded, elevated experience that enhances the emotional and service promise of luxury ownership. ‍ By integrating cutting-edge technology with deep luxury market expertise, Grace enables partner brands to deliver instant, personalized protection without friction, and at no additional cost to the client. We’ve created a first-of-its-kind embedded coverage model that replaces outdated, complex claim processes with a smooth, tech-enabled solution designed specifically for luxury. This breakthrough model redefines luxury ownership by creating new standards of luxury service, generating high-value post-sale engagement, and unlocking proprietary data and insights. ‍ Grace is currently used by leading luxury maisons and backed by a top-tier insurer. With a growing footprint across Europe and beyond, Grace is setting a new standard for peace of mind in luxury. ‍
one_liner: Offering luxury brands tech-driven, embedded protection for their customers' high-value items.

name: Grandhood
description: Grandhood (acquired by Velliv in 2020) is the first company worldwide to offer an occupational pension based on the needs of small businesses. It stands out with its simplicity and applicability apart from large-scale enterprises.
one_liner: Occupational pension for small businesses.

name: Greyparrot
description: Greyparrot provides waste recognition software that identifies materials using AI-based computer vision to monitor, audit and sort waste at scale. ‍ Their goal is to empower waste managers with actionable insights to increase recycling rates. Greyparrot is committed to unlocking the financial value of waste, which will, in turn, keep our environment clean for generations to come.
one_liner: AI-based waste recognition software to monitor, audit, and sort waste at scale.

name: gronda
description: Gronda is an industry blog and community platform designed to facilitate recruitment, transparency and knowledge exchange in the hospitality and gastronomy industries. ‍ The platform helps industry professionals showcase their expertise as well as connecting and applying to open positions. For companies, this is a one-stop-shop platform to recruit talent, build their employer brand, and solve their industry’s persistent labor shortage.
one_liner: Career platform for the hospitality and gastronomy sector.

name: Haaven
description: At Haaven, we turn home building into a stress-free experience. Our platform offers a clear, end-to-end process that eliminates surprises, whether it's where to start, how long it will take, or how much it will cost. By connecting you with a trusted network of architects, engineers, and builders, we ensure your dream home comes to life on time and within budget. We're with you from the first idea to construction and aftercare, making the process smooth and enjoyable. ‍ Europe needs more and better homes for people and the planet. Haaven meets this need by uniting construction companies across Europe onto a single platform. Our homes are built carbon neutral, using wood in prefabricated designs to reduce carbon emissions. We also preserve architectural diversity by allowing architects from all over Europe to add their designs to our platform, combining the benefits of prefab construction with unique designs.
one_liner: A homebuilding platform surrounding customers with the best architects, engineers, and builders.

name: Harbor Lab
description: Disbursements are all the expenses an agent makes on behalf of the operator whilst the vessel is in port. Harbor Lab was born out of a real-time need to automate the processing of disbursements (port costs payments to port authorities and other port-related suppliers), while reducing manual intervention and heavy administration. Utilizing Harbor Lab's platform is adding value for shipowning and shipmanaging companies & charterers. It gains efficiency and cost-savings through transparency, connectivity, & customisation. ‍
one_liner: A SaaS solution that automates port expense analysis using real-time tariffs.

name: Haz
description: Haz makes it easier for people to buy and sell their belongings, by using AI technology to remove the time consuming, frictious and manual processes traditionally associated with resale. Our proprietary receipt reading technology allows our users' belongings to be digitised automatically and in real time, significantly increasing the liquidity of everyday items such as clothing and electronics. Our mission is to create a new type of social connection which is entertaining, good for the planet and great for your wallet.
one_liner: AI-enabled social commerce app connecting people through the things they own.

name: Gustav
description: Gustav (acquired by Fuse Cooperative in 2023) is a technology company that helps mid-sized enterprises recruit and manage their contingent workforce. Their service gives the mid-market access to benefits usually only enjoyed by large corporations with more sophisticated contingent workforce programs. ‍ Their full concierge software helps companies manage the complete process from selecting staffing vendors, submitting requisitions, managing an external workforce, to paying contractors and temporary staff. ‍ Ever since the company’s foundation in 2016 Gustav has received major support from organizations and investors such as Y Combinator, Speedinvest, Lightspeed Ventures, Beenext, 10x Group and YouTube co-founder Jawed Karim.
one_liner: Helping SMEs recruit and manage contractors and contingent workers at scale.

name: Helu.io
description: Helu's core functionality focuses on automatically turning bookings-level data into financial reports and streamlining the processes of budgeting, controlling, and reporting into a seamless process. Helu can be used by any company that uses DATEV - directly or indirectly via the tax consultant.
one_liner: Streamlining budgeting, controlling, and reporting.

name: hexafarms
description: Greenhouses and indoor farms are able to grow high-quality produce year-round and are becoming the backbone of global food production. However, they struggle to keep up with increasing prices on all levels- energy, labor, and operations. ‍ Using AI models trained to understand plant biology at a commercial scale, hexafarms provides actionable insights and forecasts production capacity weeks in advance. They help growers increase their bottom line profit margins by up to 30% by reducing crop loss and manual inspections. Based in Berlin, the company currently serves growers across the EU.
one_liner: AI-powered SaaS solution enabling commercial food producers to track and predict their production capacity in real time.

name: hi.health
description: hi.health (acquired by Pliant in 2025) offers people with private health insurance convenient and safe access to health care billing via app or web. ‍ Users can easily submit their invoices digitally and hi.health takes care of the further processing, billing and customer service providing a seamless user experience. With the integrated “library” users receive a transparent overview of relevant digital health products and services, that are (partially) covered by their insurance.
one_liner: Convenient and safe access to private health insurance billing.

name: Holvi
description: Holvi (acquired by BBVA) is a digital banking solution and payment institution for European entrepreneurs, sole traders and business owners. With Holvi, SME’s can sell products online, send invoices, and track cashflow in real time. The platform offers a current account with its own IBAN number designed to help customers manage all their finances on one platform. Holvi is the world’s first financial hub operating with its own Payment Institution Licence authorised for operations across Europe by the Financial Supervisory Authority of Finland (FIN-FSA). ‍ Founded in Helsinki, Finland in 2011, the company was acquired in 2016 by BBVA. ‍
one_liner: Digital banking for entrepreneurs, sole traders, and business owners.

name: Impala
description: Nearly all technology in a hotel must connect to the central property management system. The problem is there are thousands of these systems and connecting to each one takes months and is expensive. ‍ Impala solves this by providing a single, standard API to access hotel data. They connect in advance to the property management systems and then allow companies to connect to the data they need in minutes.
one_liner: Providing a Meta API for hotel PMS.

name: Indoo.rs
description: Indoo.rs (acquired by Esri in 2019) creates advanced indoor mapping, localization, and routing technology as well as an SDK for developers and device manufacturers. They allow end-users to accurately locate themselves and others inside buildings, such as an airport, shopping mall or exhibition center, using mobile devices. The company has developed various products for navigation, proximity, and asset tracking as well as navigations solutions for visually impaired people. ‍ Indoo.rs’ award-winning technology is being used to power navigation solutions at NYC’s Penn Station, serving more than 650,000 travelers each day, as well as in airport navigation applications to help the visually impaired find their way around.
one_liner: Advanced indoor mapping, localization, and routing technology.

name: IndyKite
description: IndyKite is a San Francisco-based software company transforming enterprise AI with graph-powered solutions that bring trust, visibility, and control to complex data ecosystems. ‍ By connecting and governing data with precision, IndyKite enables secure, context-rich, and intelligent applications built on a foundation of trustworthy data.
one_liner: Graph-powered data trust for enterprise AI.

name: Inkitt
description: Inkitt is the world’s first data-powered book publisher, operating as a data-driven publishing house focused on discovering commercially successful fiction. The company operates a proprietary app where thousands of authors submit original stories, creating a large, diverse library of content across genres like romance, fantasy, and sci-fi. Inkitt's unique value is driven by its predictive algorithm, Galatea. This technology analyzes detailed reader engagement metrics—including reading speed, completion rates, and device interactions—to scientifically pinpoint stories with the highest potential for global success. This data-first system allows Inkitt to de-risk the publishing process and offer contracts to the most promising new authors.
one_liner: Using AI to discover and publish potential hit novels from its global reading community.

name: Invesdor
description: Invesdor Group combines the leading digital equity funding platform in the Nordics, Invesdor, and the leading digital mid-size (“Mittelstand”) financier in the German speaking countries, Finnest. The service portfolio spans from equity investments, bonds, IPO’s, syndicated loans, mezzanine capital and promissory notes to other debt capital instruments. Financing volumes typically range from EUR 250,000 to EUR 25m. Over the last years the combined and accumulated investments on the legacy platforms have doubled every year, currently totalling at more than EUR 130m. ‍ Invesdor Group holds a MiFID license passported to 28 European countries, which was granted to Invesdor in April 2015, making it the first such platform to receive this licence. The Group has a base of over 50,000 registered private and institutional investors from 150 countries.
one_liner: Digital investment and financing platform for companies of all sizes.

name: Investly
description: Investly is an invoice discounting platform that allows SMEs to sell their invoices to investors, thereby increasing working capital. Invoices are sold in reverse auctions where investors place bids to ensure the best prices for merchants. ‍ The bidding system allows investors to earn above average returns. Investly’s service helps established businesses take on more customers, speed up their production process, and avoid seasonal cash flow gaps.
one_liner: SME access to working capital through invoice financing.

name: IOMED
description: IOMED is a solution that helps understand free text from EHRs, letters, etc. to provide better ICD-10 coding and big data insights for hospitals, using sophisticated medical NLP and is seamlessly integrated into the existing IT landscape.
one_liner: Better ICD-10 coding and big data insights for hospitals.

name: Iyzico
description: Iyzico (acquired by PayU in 2019) is Turkey’s leading ePayment company offering businesses easy solutions to accept payments online. ‍ The platform is tailored to the needs of the local market and integrates with over 22 different payment options and banks. Customers appreciate the easy setup process and features such as recurring payments and Iyzico’s marketplace solution.
one_liner: Offering vendors a fast and easy way to receive payments online.

name: Joblocal
description: Joblocal (acquired by Funke Mediengruppe in 2014) is the first network of regional online job marketplaces in Germany and Austria. ‍ Unlike large national online job sites, joblocal connects potential candidates with relevant positions in their area. Their marketplaces cover the entire job market across all employee levels, from managers to temporary workers and interns. The company has built 34 local job marketplaces including jobs.sh, bglandJOBS.de, or MünchnerJOBS.de. Corporate customers recruiting talent on Joblocal’s marketplaces include companies like Marc O’Polo, Sixt, Ikea, and Intel. ‍
one_liner: Regional online job marketplaces in Germany and Austria.

name: 9am.health
description: 9amHealth offers complete cardiometabolic care—a first-of-its-kind, whole-body approach to preventing and treating diabetes, obesity, high cholesterol, and hypertension. ‍ 9amHealth partners with employers, PBMs and healthplans to provide effective health benefits for those living with chronic conditions. Their members receive personalized care plans, prescription delivery, at-home lab tests, and unlimited specialist access. ‍
one_liner: Care that connects it all.

name: Julaya
description: Julaya is a B2B digital account that enables companies to send and collect payments seamlessly through a digital account. ‍ With the Julaya platform, SME’s, large corporates and government institutions can make bulk payments through all mobile money channels, process their travel or online expenses with a corporate prepaid card, easily import all transactions into their accounting system, and digitize cash collection.
one_liner: Enabling companies to perform all their financial transactions in one single interface.

name: Juli
description: Juli integrates previously siloed data like data from smartphones and other wearables, environmental data and EHR data into one platform. All that data is analyzed to identify patterns and give recommendations that guide users towards better health. A patient-centric app allows the user to see their data in one dashboard, keep a journal, get reminders for their medication or be nudged towards micro-behavioural changes in a gamified way. ‍ juli is a SMART on FHIR platform that integrates easily into all kinds of health systems. This enables care providers to predict when a patient needs additional outreach to avoid a crisis and generates a common understanding of a patient's health status.
one_liner: Improving life for people with chronic conditions.

name: Kema
description: Kema is revolutionizing how B2B SMEs in MENA manage their cash flow. By combining A/R automation, embedded payments, and invoice financing into one platform, the UAE-based startup empowers businesses to digitize collections, improve on-time payments, and unlock instant liquidity. With proprietary credit scoring built from ERP and payment data, Kema helps SMEs overcome late payments and limited financing access—long-standing barriers to growth in the region. ‍ ‍By embedding itself at the core of the invoice-to-cash cycle, Kema is bridging the gap between fintech and everyday business operations. Kema facilities more than $50M in annual receivables, improves collections by up to 40% and streamlines collection processed by more than 50%. As MENA moves toward further digitization and a cashless economy, Kema is uniquely positioned to become the financial operating system for the region’s $3T B2B economy.
one_liner: A cash flow platform helping MENA SMEs get paid faster, automate A/R, and unlock invoice financing seamlessly.

name: KETS
description: A spin-out of the University of Bristol’s world-leading center in integrated photonics, KETS has developed a photonic integrated chip Quantum Key Distribution module that has lower size, weight, and power than all current other offerings. ‍ KETS is using integrated photonic technologies to offer practical, miniaturized and cost-effective solutions.
one_liner: Leveraging the properties of quantum mechanics to solve challenging problems.

name: Khazna
description: Khazna is a financial benefits platform that provides employees, labor, and contractors access to financial services. ‍ Starting with a lending and salary on demand offering, Khazna wants to become the go-to solution for any Egyptian when it comes to banking and lending solutions.
one_liner: A financial benefits platform for employees, labor, and contractors.

name: Kittl
description: Kittl provides a platform that makes complex design processes easier and faster. ‍ The new browser-based graphic design tool empowers anyone to become a creator and design logos, labels, postcards or anything else. Loaded with tons of templates, illustrations, and fonts, it offers endless design possibilities.
one_liner: Empowering creators to create complex designs faster and easier.

name: Koin
description: Koin (acquired by Despegar in 2020) is the only provider of after-delivery payment solutions in Latin America. ‍ The company offers safe and easy-to-use payment solutions to e-commerce shops that let buyers make purchases online and pay later. Koin offers online credit and instalment payment options to users with no need to fill out a registration or provide financial information. Their service helps e-commerce attract new buyer groups that previously have not been able to make payments online.
one_liner: Giving customers instant credit and installment payment options for online purchases.

name: Kraken
description: Kraken Technology Group is a British maritime technology company developing versatile, scalable uncrewed surface and subsurface platforms engineered to redefine modern maritime operations with high-performance, modular and production-ready systems. Its vessels fuse race-bred composite architecture, rapid prototyping, and autonomy, to meet current and future naval, security and commercial needs around the world.
one_liner: Developing disruptive, high-performance surface and subsurface maritime capabilities.

name: Laelaps AI
description: Laelaps AI develops a command, control, and orchestration layer that coordinates mobile robots and advanced sensors into a single autonomous response system. ‍ Designed for critical infrastructure and defence, Laelaps AI enables faster detection, smarter verification, and adaptive threat response through real-time coordination and shared risk mapping.
one_liner: Building an agentic AI layer for real-world security and infrastructure protection.

name: Landvault
description: Landvault ( acquired by Infinite Reality in 2024 ) enables developers to create, manage and sell their AR/VR inventory in minutes, so they can focus on what they do best: creating great content. Landvault offers a plugin for Unity and Unreal Engine which allows normal ads to be displayed in VR/AR or gaming content, filter hundreds of advertisers via our programmatic platform and start generating revenue in minutes.
one_liner: Helping developers make money by connecting them to traditional ad networks.

name: Lapse
description: Lapse is a photo-sharing platform that emulates the spontaneous experience of a disposable film camera to capture authentic, unedited moments. When a user snaps a picture, it enters a digital "darkroom" and develops over a few hours. This deliberate delay prevents editing and post-capture curation, ensuring all photos possess a spontaneous, natural aesthetic. The core mission of Lapse is to cultivate genuine, low-pressure connections, guided by our motto: "Friends, not Followers." The app is designed for intimate sharing, directing developed photos to small friend circles in a personalized "Journal" and intentionally removing public performance metrics like follower counts and likes. ‍
one_liner: For friends, not followers.

name: Ledgy
description: Ledgy helps companies build cultures of ownership. With Ledgy, companies can manage and automate key equity processes, saving time and money. Meanwhile, employees benefit from rich insights into their ownership, helping the whole team align around the company’s mission. Founded in Switzerland in 2017, Ledgy serves more than 2,500 customers in over 40 countries around the world. ‍
one_liner: Helping teams take the pain out of equity and share ownership.

name: Lemonflow
description: Lemonflow builds voice-based AI agents that automate customer support across EV charging and mobility. Purpose-built for the complexities of mobility infrastructure, Lemonflow’s agents deliver instant, multilingual support around the clock, resolving driver issues, triggering remote actions, and drastically cutting costs. ‍ Live with leading charge point operators across Europe, Lemonflow combines deep domain expertise with real-time system integrations to create a scalable support layer for the future of mobility.
one_liner: The AI infrastructure layer for operations in mobility.

name: Lemonway
description: Lemonway is a Pan-European Fintech startup dedicated to Crowdfunding platforms, e-commerce marketplaces and other companies looking for payment processing, wallet management and third-party payment in a KYC/AML-regulated framework. ‍ Lemonway’s technology solution and associated services enable banks to benefit from a very powerful real-time payment account management tool.
one_liner: Facilitating complex payments for digital platforms and e-commerce websites.

name: Leta
description: Built for Africa's unique logistics challenges, Leta’s AI-powered platform optimizes delivery routes, tracks shipments in real time, and streamlines payments while transforming shipment data into actionable insights. ‍ Since 2022, Leta has powered millions of deliveries, managed thousands of vehicles, and expanded from Kenya into Nigeria, Uganda, Zambia, and Zimbabwe—working with brands like KFC, EABL, and Chandaria Industries.
one_liner: Helping businesses optimize the movement of goods to reduce costs and minimize climate impact.

name: Lizee
description: Lizee is building a more sustainable retail industry by helping brands adapt their businesses to include a rental service. ‍ The Lizee Rental Lab makes the process simple and hassle free by first optimizing the brands existing eCommerce site for renting. The team then handles the picking, packing, shipping and facilitation of payments for rented products, oversees quality checks for returned products, refurbishing, and more. Lizee does the heavy lifting and retailers reap the financial rewards.
one_liner: Enabling brands and retailers to launch circular rental services.

name: LizzyAI
description: Founded in the USA by serial entrepreneur Yannis Niebelschütz, Lizzy AI is a next-generation recruiting platform that uses AI-powered, structured interviews to streamline and standardize hiring. The platform automatically generates interview questions, conducts assessments, and delivers clear, comparable scoring to reduce bias and accelerate decisions. Companies use Lizzy AI to evaluate candidates more objectively and at scale, while significantly reducing recruiter workload. The result: faster hiring, better talent matches, and an improved candidate experience.
one_liner: Recruiting platform that uses AI-powered interviews to help companies hire faster, fairer, and more efficiently.

name: Luko
description: Launched in May 2018, and acquired by Admiral Group in 2023, Luko’s revolutionary home insurance is simple: customers get covered in 2 minutes, claims paid in 2 hours, and repairman’s visit your home in 2 days. ‍ Offering a new transparent and responsible model, Luko transforms insurance core business model to align the interests of the tenant and the insurer. The company provides AI and ‘plug&play’ smart devices that monitor consumptions in order to identify and prevent disasters, such as flooding, fire and burglary.
one_liner: Reinventing home insurance.

name: Maqsad
description: Maqsad is a mobile-first edtech platform that delivers high-quality personalized academic content for 100 million Pakistani students. The platform provides a holistic learning experience where users can learn a concept, test their knowledge, and ask questions. The edtech has developed the MENAP region's first instant query-solving engine, which matches student queries to video solutions within seconds. In just the last 6 months, Maqsad has reached over 1 million students and answered 4 million plus student queries. The platform is building AI-enabled tools to increase personalization, adaptive learning, and build a data-driven ecosystem to improve learning outcomes. ‍
one_liner: Building a personalized learning platform to make high-quality education accessible to 100 million Pakistani students.

name: Meisterwerk
description: Craftsmen and construction companies face a huge challenge managing their resources in a highly dynamic environment. ‍ Meisterwerk provides an easy to use SaaS solution, which makes planning and coordination processes between offices and construction sites more efficient. The software enables their customers to track the status and progress of their jobs and resources in real-time, increase overall profitability, and unlock growth potential for their companies.
one_liner: Automating job and resource planning for SME craftsmen and construction companies.

name: Mercanis
description: Simplify and automate your procurement procedures and processes.
one_liner: Scaling procurement excellence through our AI-powered platform solutions.

name: Metis Labs
description: On a daily basis, large industrial processes face problems related to operational inefficiencies and low yields. The resulting waste adds significantly to their operating costs, production capacity, and environmental footprint. ‍ Metis Labs ( aquired by Ascalia in 2024 ) offers a unique and valuable solution. The company has created an intelligent software application capable of adapting itself to the characteristics of any industrial production process and improving operational efficiency.
one_liner: Using AI to maximize industrial efficiency and cut waste.

name: Mews
description: Mews is a property management system designed to streamline and automate hotel operations. By integrating reservations, front desk, payments, guest experience, and back-office workflows into a single platform, Mews enables hospitality operators to increase efficiency, unlock new revenue streams, and deliver a seamless guest journey. Trusted by thousands of properties worldwide, Mews is redefining how hospitality businesses operate. In 2025, Mews joined our portfolio following its acquisition of Flexkeeping.
one_liner: The hospitality management platform powering modern hotels.

name: MiLaboratories
description: MiLaboratories is the leader in immunome data analysis software with flagship product MiXCR, a top-notch solution to analyze immunology sequencing data. ‍ Our software is used in vaccine, cancer, antibodies, and autoimmune diseases drug development pipelines. We provide a secure, scalable, and fast solution that helps thousands of researchers around the globe to discover new drugs and therapies.
one_liner: The leader in immunome data analysis software with flagship product MiXCR.

name: Milano Vice
description: Founded in Berlin in 2022, Milano Vice is an amplifier for partner restaurants, traditional bakeries, and professional chefs. ‍ Milano Vice partners can triple partners' sales thanks to resource optimization through increased utilization of kitchen and staff. It targets Gen Y and Z customers through its innovative branding and provides state-of-the-art technology to its partner restaurants.
one_liner: Germany's first virtual restaurant chain.

name: Mimic Robotics
description: Zurich-based Mimic is a physical AI company enabling robots to perform complex, human-level dexterous tasks autonomously. Its AI foundation model and humanoid robotic hands bring human-like manipulation to real-world industrial use cases. By combining advanced AI, scalable hardware, and a novel solution to robotics data scarcity, Mimic lays the groundwork for the next generation of intelligent automation.
one_liner: AI-driven, human-dexterous robots that autonomously perform complex real-world tasks at industrial scale.

name: MindsDB
description: MindsDB helps organizations use machine learning and artificial intelligence to obtain predictive insights that can allow them to make better business decisions. ‍ MindsDB trains, tests and then selects the most accurate state of the art AI models to apply to your data allowing for accurate predictions and forecasting.
one_liner: Improves the predictive power of your data.

name: MinersAI
description: The need for critical minerals is expected to grow up to 40x in the next 20 years, and discovered reserves are far too low to meet demand. ‍ Mineral Exploration needs to be deployed at scale to identify new deposits, in geographies where ESG standards are well enforced. ‍ MinersAI is focused on the early-stage part of mineral exploration: before prospectors even identify a target. Customers can save years in finding, acquiring and processing the data they need to make expensive targeting decisions in their Minerals Exploration Projects, thanks to innovative data management, exchange and AI tools.
one_liner: Geological data platform and marketplace for mineral exploration companies.

name: Molecule
description: Molecule is creating collaborative ecosystems, where stakeholders in drug development can work together to expedite the process of bringing novel therapeutics to patients - connecting leading researchers to funding by turning intellectual property and its development into a liquid and easily investable asset.
one_liner: Connecting life science research to funding.

name: MoonPay
description: MoonPay is a financial technology platform enabling individuals and businesses to buy, sell, and manage digital assets through simple, compliant, and user-friendly on- and off-ramps. By integrating payments, identity verification, and regulatory infrastructure into a single experience, MoonPay powers access to the crypto economy for users and enterprises worldwide. In 2025, MoonPay joined our portfolio following its share-swap acquisition of Iron.
one_liner: The global infrastructure for seamless crypto payments.

name: Moove
description: Moove embeds its alternative credit-scoring technology into ride-hailing and e-logistics platforms, which allows access to the proprietary performance and revenue analytics of mobility entrepreneurs to underwrite loans. ‍ Moove’s model is to provide loans to its customers by selling them new vehicles and financing up to 95 percent of the purchase within five days of signup. This data then empowers Moove to offer a wide range of other relevant financial products to their users.
one_liner: Africa's first mobility Fintech providing revenue-based vehicle financing.

name: Mophones
description: Founded in Kenya, MoPhones is building an accessible device-financing and recommerce infrastructure for Africa, starting with refurbished smartphones and flexible payment plans. ‍ The company addresses a structural gap in affordable device access while extending the lifecycle of existing hardware. By formalizing a fragmented market and reducing upfront costs for consumers, MoPhones is creating a scalable entry point into digital inclusion and circular tech across the continent.
one_liner: Device-financing and recommerce platform expanding affordable access to quality electronics.

name: Mpiriq
description: Built as an AI-powered infrastructure, MPIRIQ’s platform connects real-world healthcare data from daily medical practice with researchers and pharma partners. By automatically structuring clinical information and enabling secure, privacy-preserving data exchange, it turns everyday patient encounters into actionable evidence for faster medical innovation. This continuous loop between care and research reduces documentation burdens for clinicians, improves data access for scientists, and accelerates the development of new therapies. The result: better care, better research, and progress that benefits everyone.
one_liner: MPIRIQ links everyday clinical data with medical research to turn routine patient care into insights that accelerate new therapies.

name: MyClubs
description: MyClubs ( acquired by Urban Sports Club in 2024 ) is a flexible fitness subscription that gives members access to various gyms, yoga studios, and many other workout providers across Austria and Switzerland. ‍ Users can choose between different subscription models and use the complimentary myClubs app to check in to classes. MyClub also offers a solution for corporate fitness which lets companies provide MyClubs memberships to their employees as part of their employee benefits packages. ‍ Since the company’s foundation in 2014, MyClubs has grown into the leading sports aggregator in Austria and Switzerland with over 1,200 exclusive contractual partners.
one_liner: Flexible fitness subscription.

name: MyDataModels
description: MyDataModels is the developer of TADA, an analytics platform powered by Artificial Intelligence . ‍ Powerful and easy to use, TADA helps companies analyze and extract value from data. The platform generates highly interpretable and accurate predictive models, and contrary to traditional machine learning methods, the solution works with small data sets. No coding or data science expertise are required! ‍ French-based MyDataModels' unique technology is the preferred solution for healthcare, research, industry and embedded systems.
one_liner: MyDataModels believes that Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Data Science should be open and available all.

name: NECTURE
description: Necture (formerly Ubiq) empowers businesses to unlock the full potential of fleets, seamlessly bridging the gap between mobility and energy. ‍ Combining human-driven information with data-driven intelligence, we provide tailored solutions that optimize operations, reduce costs, and achieve sustainability goals. Our AI-driven technology platform offers advanced data analytics, automation, and user experience for efficient fleet management. Going beyond mere intelligence, we translate data into real-world actions, minimizing environmental impact and driving a cleaner, greener future.
one_liner: Building a world where electric fleets are not only possible, but thrive.

name: NeoCarbon
description: NeoCarbon reverses climate change by dramatically cutting the costs associated with Direct Air Capture. ‍ By retrofitting existing cooling towers without impacting their original function, the time and cost investment needed to set up a carbon capturing system is reduced by up to 10x.
one_liner: Capturing carbon directly from the atmosphere at scale to profitably leverage the existing airflow and waste heat of industrial cooling towers.

name: NeuroHarmonics
description: NeuroHarmonics is pioneering the future of brain health through a revolutionary platform that unites surgical-level precision with at-home accessibility. ‍ Using proprietary focused ultrasound technology, their wearable headset can safely modulate deep brain circuits to treat neurological and psychiatric conditions—transforming neuromodulation from an expensive, invasive procedure into scalable, continuous therapy.
one_liner: Building the future of non-invasive neuromodulation using focused ultrasound to modulate deep brain circuits safely.

name: Nilo Health
description: nilo.health makes high-quality mental health support easily accessible for everyone, enabling employers to conveniently and effectively offer mental health services as a company benefit. ‍ Through its evidence-based and confidential platform, nilo.health provides employees with the right level of care based on their individual needs: the support ranges from 1 on 1 sessions with psychologists to group sessions and digital, self-guided tools.
one_liner: The mental well-being support for your entire workforce.

name: Nofence
description: Nofence’s virtual fencing system combines solar-powered, GPS-enabled collars connected via cellular network to an easy-to-use app, allowing farmers to create and adjust virtual grazing boundaries from their phone, enabling real-time tracking and responsive herd management. When an animal approaches the boundary, the collar emits sounds that gradually increase in pitch, prompting it to change direction. If the animal continues forward, it receives a mild electric pulse designed to be half as intense as traditional electric fences. Over time, the majority of interactions are resolved with sound alone, resulting in calmer, more predictable grazing behaviour. This innovation replaces the need for physical fencing, reducing infrastructure and maintenance costs, labour, and environmental impact. By giving farmers greater control over how and where their livestock graze, Nofence helps improve soil health, prevents overgrazing, and supports regenerative land management practices, particularly in remote or environmentally sensitive areas. ‍
one_liner: The world’s first commercial virtual fencing system for livestock.

name: Nomos
description: With a growing consumer appetite for energy self-sufficiency, smart heating, and charging solutions, homeowners increasingly demand full-service offerings, going beyond hardware installation and optimization, and including dynamic electricity plans to take full advantage of price fluctuations. ‍ Nomos addresses this need by providing OEMs and installers with an easy-to-integrate API solution for dynamic electricity plans. Acting as a licensed electricity retailer on the European electricity exchange market (EPEX SPOT), Nomos takes care of all legal and operational complexity, enabling its B2B clients to offer comprehensive energy solutions without upfront costs and operational effort.
one_liner: Helping hardware companies launch electricity plans by abstracting all legal and operational complexity into a simple API layer.

name: Nook
description: Accounting software can't pay your bills. Banks don't know which bills to pay. Nook integrates both to give you payment perfection.
one_liner: Helping accountants and businesses manage their payments and payroll.

name: Octav
description: Octav is an all-in-one platform that fills major financial information gaps by providing its users with valuable financial data, including cost basis and P&L of all their assets and NFTs on major chains. ‍ Investors also have the freedom to easily edit their inaccurate transactions, and manage their portfolio by using in-house tools to interact with the web3 ecosystem, such as buying, selling, claiming or compounding their assets directly on the platform.
one_liner: Know your cost-basis at all times and make better decisions.

name: one-five
description: Sustainable packaging alternatives are usually very expensive to deploy at full market scale as the products are not mature enough yet. one • fıve tackles this problem of scalability by transforming existing academic lab-scale material science inventions into market-ready solutions that are economically viable and meet the rising demand of conscious consumers. They systematically discover promising - but not yet mature - research results from renowned universities and research institutes. Researchers at one • fıve further develop this IP in their own 5,000 m² R&D campus near Hamburg, Germany. The facility includes algae cultivation, processing, fermentation capacity, a laboratory, a prototype workshop and testing facilities, giving them the necessary infrastructure to further develop these technologies from a previous proof of concept into a market-ready proof of scalability.
one_liner: Transforming material science inventions into sustainable packaging products.

name: One Trading
description: One Trading, formerly Bitpanda Pro, is a European digital asset exchange made for experienced traders, finance professionals and institutions. Safe, regulated and intuitive, they offer over 50 tokens to deliver deep EUR, GBP and CHF liquidity at a competitive rate. As well as their high performance spot exchange, they also have an OTC desk.
one_liner: Providing experienced traders, finance professionals, and institutions with regulated and secure access to digital assets.

name: OneTrust
description: OneTrust builds the Trust Intelligence Platform – connecting privacy, GRC, ethics, and ESG teams, data, and processes – so companies big and small can collaborate seamlessly and put trust at the center of their operations and culture. We help companies and supply chains stay resilient through the unknown. We empower ethical cultures so companies can uphold the highest standards of trust. We help measure and track ESG initiatives so companies can play a meaningful role in shaping a better future for all. ‍
one_liner: Helping companies manage privacy, consent, and AI governance to reduce risk, build trust, and drive innovation.

name: Onit
description: OnIt, a licensed bank in Kenya, offers a free transaction network linking consumers, businesses, and suppliers, enhanced with services like check-out finance, premium financial products, and open APIs for easy consumer integration.
one_liner: Building your bank, free from hidden fees.

name: Opal
description: Some companies specialize in stealing our time on screens, using features like notifications, infinite scrolling, A.I. curated feeds, subconscious triggers and disappearing stories. Opal helps you take control of your technology, so you can regain time that's been stolen from you. ‍ Their app identifies and blocks distractions, allows you to set screen timers, personal intentions for your time, and receive personalized nudges to help you find balance each day.
one_liner: Become indistractable.

name: open
description: Open is a business banking platform that combines everything from invoicing to banking, payroll and automated accounting in one place. ‍ It also offers the best of the classic banking services like (internet banking, cheque books, Debit card) along with these additional features.
one_liner: Digital business account and expense management tools for SMEs and startups.

name: Due
description: Established in 2022, Due is a London-based fintech startup with a vision to reshape international payments through blockchain and stablecoin innovations. The company provides borderless multi-currency accounts, global transfers / remittances and merchant acquiring for individuals and businesses. Due built its platform on top of public blockchains, leveraging stablecoin liquidity markets across Europe, US, LatAm and Africa to enable accessible, fast, and cheap international money movements for clients around the world. Due’s platform is non-custodial, meaning the clients always have full control of, and direct access to, their assets on public blockchains without the involvement of intermediaries.
one_liner: Reshaping international payments through blockchain and stablecoin innovations.

name: Orakl Oncology
description: Cancer complexity leads to a 96% failure rate of drug candidates in clinical trials and a shortage of new treatments. Orakl Oncology’s ambition is to finally address the heterogeneity of cancer and patient specificities as early as possible in drug development. ‍ By creating a collection of avatars of patients’ tumors, they predict how each patient will respond to future drugs, combining best-in-class biology with deep clinical data and machine learning to efficiently discover and optimize new treatments for the right patients.
one_liner: Leveraging patient tumor avatars to transform drug development in oncology.

name: ORUS
description: ORUS’ mission is to deliver high-resolution hyperspectral space imagery with native precision and fidelity, enabling accurate identification of objects and environments based on their chemical composition and surface conditions, at scale. ‍ This is achieved through a commercial microsatellite imagery constellation and interpretation, thanks to ORUS’ proprietary automatic processing technologies, which enable the unprecedented exploitation of large volumes of data and the classification of chemicals and materials. ‍ For the first time, ORUS will deliver a combination of data resolution and information reliability that enables effective public policy enforcement, strengthens security, and supports corporate environmental accountability and business sustainability. ‍
one_liner: Delivering hyperspectral satellite imagery at scale, improving environmental accountability, public policy, and security worldwide.

name: Pace Revenue
description: Pace (acquired by FlyrLabs in 2022) was founded to change revenue management and help companies be more effective in their distribution and sales - empowering them to make better use of resources, generate less waste, and contribute to a better world.
one_liner: Hospitality revenue management platform utilizing machine learning and statistical modelling.

name: Packhelp
description: Packhelp allows its clients to quickly design and order custom packaging. A very user-friendly box editor, revolutionary low minimum order size and fast, high-quality production are the reasons why Packhelp’s services are being used by both small e-commerce entrepreneurs and multinational corporations. ‍ Packhelp’s mission is to enable every company – regardless of its size – to offer the best unboxing experience possible. Customers can expect new products and services that will push their packaging experience to the next level.
one_liner: Enabling businesses to offer customers the best unboxing experience possible.

name: PalmHR
description: A SaaS based platform for businesses, palm.hr fully automates HR management to transform employee experiences. Founded in 2019 in Riyadh, palm.hr ’s innovative technology is designed to elevate HR functioning with a number of solutions to create efficiencies for businesses.
one_liner: Simply a better HR experience.

name: Paua
description: Paua supports getting more people into electric vehicles by harmonizing the fragmented landscape of electric vehicle chargepoints. Through aggregating smart connected electric vehicle charging infrastructure, we enable a transition to cleaner transport. ‍ We use technology to provide drivers with the latest chargepoint status, to enable direct integration to start a charge and we aggregate all the costs into one bill. All of our charging is guaranteed backed by renewable energy. One app, one card, one bill, thousands of chargepoints and zero emissions.
one_liner: Building the universal electric vehicle charging solution for businesses.

name: Pemo
description: Pemo is a UAE-based startup on a mission to empower small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) across the Middle East, North Africa and Pakistan (MENAP) region by offering an all-in-one spend management platform that includes prepaid corporate cards, invoice payment systems and expense tracking functions. The company aims to remove friction in day-to-day spending processes, allowing businesses to entrust their teams to make quicker and more responsible purchasing decisions. In addition to accounting automation, virtual and physical cards with built-in rules and the consolidation of inbound invoices, Pemo’s software offers an integrated dashboard with full visibility over company spending and real-time tracking and reporting options.
one_liner: Corporate cards and all-in-one spend management for SMEs in MENAP.

name: Perk
description: Perk (formerly TravelPerk) is an AI-native platform built to eliminate “shadow work” – the invisible, manual tasks such as filing expenses, coding invoices, and chasing approvals that drain employee productivity. By unifying travel booking, expense management, and corporate payments into a single, seamless experience, Perk enables companies worldwide to save time and refocus on their core business. In 2025, Perk joined our portfolio following its acquisition of Yokoy. ‍
one_liner: The intelligent platform for travel and spend management.

name: Pimloc
description: Pimloc is a British tech company which provides specialist deep learning services for video security and data privacy applications. It has developed a world leading platform for the ingestion, detection, classification, and protection of image and video content. ‍ The Pimloc platform has been trained by showing it millions of images across a wide range of content. It has learned how to recognize and classify faces, objects, and even scenes in images it has never seen before.
one_liner: Deep learning services for video security and data privacy applications.

name: Planetly
description: Planetly (acquired by OneTrust in 2021) is a climate-tech-company developing digital tools enabling companies to analyze, reduce and compensate their Co2 emissions. By completely automating the process of data acquisition, Planetly provides real-time analysis of the carbon footprint and the required transparency and tools reduce it. Planetly was founded by Berlin serial entrepreneurs Anna Alex and Benedikt Franke in January 2020.
one_liner: Building the easiest tools for your business to analyse, reduce and offset your carbon footprint.

name: planqc
description: planqc was founded 2022 by a team of scientists from the Max-Planck-Institute of Quantum Optics and Ludwig-Maximilians-University Munich and is the first startup to emerge from the Munich Quantum Valley, one of the leading quantum technology hubs in Europe. planqc’s quantum computers are built on the precision of the world’s best atomic clocks, the world’s best quantum gas microscopes, and high-speed Rydberg gates. This unique combination of quantum technologies is the fastest way to scale to thousands of qubits, a prerequisite for industry-relevant quantum advantage. ‍
one_liner: Building quantum computers from individual atoms to achieve massive scale.

name: Platypus
description: Platypus is the HR tech solution that helps HR professionals measure what people value at every stage of the talent lifecycle, from attraction to management to retention. Its solution equips managers with the right data collected from every single employee in order to meet their needs and prepare themselves for future business challenges. With its value-centric approach to company culture they have identified 12 work-related values, corresponding to 3 core areas of organizational culture, that provide unique insights into individuals’ needs and priorities while protecting their anonymity.
one_liner: Talent lifecycle management solution for HR managers.

name: Playbrush
description: Playbrush (aquired by Sunstar Global in 2021) is a London and Vienna-based technology company that digitizes oral care for children. With Playbrush, boring brushing routines suddenly become an exciting adventure. The colorful, smart toothbrush attachment fits onto the handle of any manual toothbrush so kids control planes, paint masterpieces and win dance battles via their brushing movements. Personalized feedback, statistics and brushing rewards mean brushing is now not only fun, but also effective. The Playbrush comes with a variety of games, a data monitoring application for parents and regular toothbrush and toothpaste supplies.
one_liner: Gamifying children’s teeth brushing routine.

name: Plural AI
description: Plural AI has built an AI-powered Knowledge Workbench that helps you aggregate and organize all your information, to generate complex insights, improve your research workflows, and make better investment decisions. ‍ Plural AI is setting the standard in knowledge work augmentation and workflow automation; the company aims to redefine the way people search, interact, and manipulate data at scale. The long term vision is to become the default interface for knowledge work, enabling business users to access complex data science without knowing how to code.
one_liner: The first dedicated research platform to enable better business and financial analysis.

name: + Simple
description: +Simple is the leading digital insurance provider for SME’s in France. By integrating with the +Simple platform, either as a white-label or native solution, brokers and agents in the commercial insurance space are able to quickly and efficiently quote, bind and issue policies to their business clients. ‍ Using +Simple’s technology and carrier network, intermediaries are able to easily build modular products tailored to merchants’ highly specialized coverage needs. Through their online portal digitally native businesses are able to get a comprehensive and bespoke policy in a matter of minutes. By working directly with insurance carriers, brokers / agents, and SME’s alike +Simple is involved with all major players in the value chain streamlining the entire commercial insurance process throughout.
one_liner: Digital insurance provider for SME’s.

name: Polaron
description: Polaron translates microscopy images into actionable insight, revealing how microstructure links manufacturing processes to material performance. By automating characterisation and enabling generative design, the platform helps engineers optimise production and develop higher-performing materials across metals, ceramics, polymers, and composites.
one_liner: Building an AI-first platform to connect process, structure, and performance in materials science.

name: Porotech
description: Porotech is revolutionizing the semiconducting industry thanks to its multifunctional GaN semiconductor wafers. Their proprietary technology and unique production process allow for the creation of porous semiconductor materials and structures with enhanced behavior. ‍ GaN has important photonic properties which allow it to be used in LEDs and microLEDS, as well as energy efficient properties which have important applications in RF and power devices.
one_liner: Developing high-performance and energy-efficient multifunctional GaN semiconductor wafers.

name: Precium
description: Precium (formerly Revio) is the first African payments platform purpose-built for enterprise. Industry leaders choose Precium to optimise payment performance, automate financial operations, and craft extraordinary customer experiences. ‍ Founded in 2020 by Ruaan Botha and Nicole Dunn, Precium aims to combat the impact of payment fragmentation and failure on consumer commerce in African markets. Its unified payments platform offers merchants access to locally-optimised payment methods, with built-in redundancy and routing rules to increase payment success rates. Beyond payment acceptance, Precium offers a suite of configurable payment operations and recovery solutions – such as automated reconciliation, monitoring, and alerting – to help enterprise merchants reduce payment complexity. ‍ The growing list of Precium customers includes South Africa’s largest retailers and financial institutions, and some of the world’s largest consumer brands. The company partners with its clients to deliver payment solutions that enable quantifiable business value with the scalability, reliability, and flexibility required for high-volume processing.
one_liner: The first African payments platform purpose-built for enterprise.

name: Prewave
description: Prewave is an Austrian-based AI company that specializes in supply chain risk intelligence and monitoring for global enterprises. The platform continuously monitors and analyzes massive amounts of public and non-public data, including news, social media, and industry reports, to predict supply chain disruptions before they occur. ‍ The company transforms unstructured data into actionable, real-time alerts for risks like geopolitical events, factory fires, labor disputes, and sustainability violations anywhere in a company’s multi-tier supply network. ‍
one_liner: Predicting supply chain and sustainability risks.

name: Primer
description: Primer aims to unify and supercharge merchants’ fragmented payments ecosystems through a single platform. ‍ By delivering data-driven insights across our entire merchant-base, Primer can optimize front and back-end payment flows in order to increase authorization rates, reduce costs, expand into new markets and deliver leading-edge commerce experiences to customers.
one_liner: Helping online merchants power the best commerce experiences in the world.

name: PurposeGreen
description: One-stop-shop transforming investment properties into sustainable assets, providing energy audits, green subsidies & financing, and construction project execution combined with smart ESG & energy intelligence. By combining technology with actually touching the building, Purpose aims to become the EU-wide executive branch and digital control center of reaching the 1.5°C decarbonisation goal.
one_liner: End-to-end solution for energy CAPEX and long-term ESG management.

name: Qovery
description: Qovery simplifies the process of getting apps into production by pushing code from Github or GitLab and deploying it directly to AWS, Digital Ocean, or Scaleway instantly. ‍ The company abstracts away all the complexity that comes with deployment and at the same time combines the power of Kubernetes, the reliability of AWS, and the simplicity of Heroku.
one_liner: The simplest way to deploy your applications on AWS.

name: QphoX
description: QphoX’s proprietary quantum transducer coherently translates quantum information from the microwave to the optical domain, allowing for quantum processing units to be connected, scaled up, and used in quantum networks. ‍ Their solutions allow for small, high-fidelity quantum processors to be connected into a large, parallel quantum processing unit for more powerful distributed computation.
one_liner: Allowing quantum computers to be networked together.

name: Raus
description: Raus is a hospitality-tech startup that offers city-dwellers new opportunities to take a break from big city life with perfectly simple cabins, close enough for a spontaneous getaway, far enough to completely unwind. Founded in 2021 by school friends Christopher Eilers, Johann Ahlers and Julian Trautwein in Berlin, Raus' mission is to provide seamless access to restful space outside your daily routine. ‍ Industry-leading VCs and angel investors backing Raus include venture capital firm Speedinvest, Tourlane founders, Julian Stiefel and Julian Weselek, former Airbnb Managing Director (Europe, Middle East and Africa) and Zazume Co-Founder, Jeroen Merchiers, and BCG Digital Ventures Managing Director & Partner, Urs Rahne, among others.
one_liner: Creating getaways with smart, sustainable cabins near major cities.

name: ready2order
description: ready2order (acquired by Zucchetti Group in 2023) offers a multi-award winning, cloud-based point-of-sale solution that transforms every smartphone, tablet and PC into a fully functional cash register. Companies that use ready2order have access to a range of awesome tools that are more powerful and easier to use than enterprise systems – but only for a fraction of the cost.
one_liner: Transforming every smartphone, tablet, and PC into a fully functional cash register.

name: receeve
description: Receeve is turning the current way of collecting debt upside down, by using AI to provide personalized collections and replace the outdated process of lenders using phone calls or letters to reach indebted clients. ‍ With Receeve, firms can communicate with their customers digitally, on any device, and customers have the option of self-service to manage their issues. The platform covers the entire collections lifecycle from managing receivables to servicing NPL portfolios.
one_liner: Fully digital debt-servicing platform for the entire collection lifecycle.

name: Recyda
description: Recyda provides SaaS for packaging data management to drive sustainability and accelerate the circular economy. This all-in-one solution helps companies digitally manage their full packaging portfolios by navigating the high complexity of country-specific regulations, waste infrastructure, and varying fee structures for recyclability, Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) fees, and plastic taxes. ‍ The software creates impact through core features that support the entire packaging lifecycle. It offers forecasting and modeling capabilities to accurately calculate fees and assess new packaging designs against international guidelines, directly supporting R&D and optimization. Additionally, built-in reporting and analytics ensure companies can easily meet internal and external requirements and make informed decisions about their entire portfolio.
one_liner: Providing SaaS for packaging data management to help businesses meet international recyclability requirements.

name: Refurbed
description: Refurbed's mission is to make sustainable technology accessible to everyone by offering high-quality, pre-owned devices at affordable prices. ‍ Their platform provides a wide selection of refurbished smartphones, laptops, tablets, and other electronics, all thoroughly inspected and restored to full working condition. By extending the lifespan of these products, Refurbed reduces electronic waste and promotes a circular economy, benefiting both consumers and the environment.
one_liner: Online marketplace for buying and selling professionally refurbished electronics.

name: Remberg
description: Remberg's Asset-Relationship-Management (ARM) System is a cloud-based software solution that enables seamless service processes across organizations around your assets in one single platform. ‍ Manufacturers, service providers and operators of industrial assets access and process machine-related information such as documentation, spare parts, or service cases from one single source.
one_liner: Digitizing service processes of industrial machinery.

name: Resourcify
description: Resourcify connects waste-producers and recyclers to make recycling easy, fast and affordable.
